hooks.command: file_path=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty') && case "$file_path" in *go.mod) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && go mod tidy ;; *_types.go) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && make manifests generate ;; esac

cmd=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && case "$cmd" in *'gh pr create'*) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && { BEFORE=$(git diff --name-only) && make fmt && AFTER=$(git diff --name-only) && test "$BEFORE" = "$AFTER" || { echo 'gofmt changed files — commit the formatting fixes first' >&2; exit 2; }; } && make lint && make test || exit 2 ;; esac
